sentences.sentence: The reception desk is straight ahead.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants (desk, straight, ahead)

sentences.sentence: Please check in at the front counter first.
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress placement in compound noun (front counter); consonant cluster (first)

sentences.sentence: When you arrive, please describe your symptoms to the receptionist at the window.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced function words in rapid sequence (to the); linked speech across clause boundary (when you_arrive)

sentences.sentence: You can schedule a follow-up visit at the same counter.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced syllables in multi-syllable word (schedule); stress placement in compound noun (follow-up visit)

sentences.sentence: Insurance forms are available here.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants (forms, available)

sentences.sentence: Staff members are available if you need any assistance.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced syllables in multi-syllable word (available, assistance)

sentences.sentence: When you are ready to be seen, please have a seat in the waiting area to your left.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced function words in rapid sequence (to be, to your); final consonant clusters at phrase boundaries (seat in, left)

sentences.sentence: The mailboxes are down this hallway.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants (mailboxes, down); linking (down_this)

sentences.sentence: The laundry room is located on the ground floor.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking (is_located); stress placement in compound noun (laundry room, ground floor)

sentences.sentence: A shared kitchen and lounge are available on every floor.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking (are_available); reduced syllables in multi-syllable word (available)

sentences.sentence: Quiet study rooms can be reserved through the front desk.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking (can_be_reserved); stress placement in compound noun (study room, front desk)

sentences.sentence: Recycling and trash bins are placed beside each stairwell.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (trash, placed); reduced syllables in multi-syllable word (recycling)

sentences.sentence: Your room key also opens the main entrance after hours.
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress placement in compound noun (room key); linking (opens_the)

sentences.sentence: The front desk staff will gladly help you with any questions.
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress placement in compound noun (front desk); reduced function words (with any)

sentences.sentence: Sign-up sheets are posted by the door.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (sheets, posted); clear word-final consonants (door)

sentences.sentence: Individual study desks are arranged along the back wall.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (desks); stress placement in compound noun (study desk, back wall)

sentences.sentence: Subject tutors are assigned to each table in the main room.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (subject); linking (are_assigned)

sentences.sentence: You can request a specific tutor at the front counter.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (request, specific); stress placement in compound noun (front counter)

sentences.sentence: Printed practice sets can be collected from the resource shelf.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (printed, sets); linking (can_be_collected)

sentences.sentence: Group sessions are held in the rooms across the hallway.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (group); linking (are_held)

sentences.sentence: When you are finished, please return your materials to the shelf near the entrance.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linked speech across clause boundary (when you_are); reduced function words in rapid sequence (to the)
